testcases.expectedOutput: +------+------------+-----------+ | id | visit_date | people | +------+------------+-----------+ | 5 | 2017-01-05 | 145 | | 6 | 2017-01-06 | 1455 | | 7 | 2017-01-07 | 199 | | 8 | 2017-01-09 | 188 | +------+------------+-----------+ Explanation: The four rows with ids 5, 6, 7, and 8 have consecutive ids and each of them has >= 100 people attended. Note that row 8 was included even though the visit_date was not the next day after row 7. The rows with ids 2 and 3 are not included because we need at least three consecutive ids.
